message:
fix: resolve 4 test failures in restore_process and workflows

- restore_process: fix assertion expecting double-quotes when shell_escape
  uses single-quotes for paths with spaces
- workflows/engine: fix compute_next_step_out_of_order_logs — explicitly
  set log IDs so the highest-step log has the highest ID (matching the
  max_by_key(id) lookup used by compute_next_step)
- workflows/engine: fix compute_next_step_jump_to — same ID ordering fix
  so jump_log is treated as the most recent action
- workflows/mod: fix compute_next_step_with_retry_returns_same — retry
  re-executes the same step (returns step_index), not step 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
